CMob::GenerateMovePath.notes: Opcode 0xBC. v83 wire is the narrowest of the four audited versions — atlas's `(GMS && >83) || JMS` gates exclude the multiTargetForBall/randTimeForAreaAttack count+loop blocks, the hackedCodeCRC field between flyCtxTargetY and the Flush body, and the post-Flush bChasing tail. Decompile cross-check: COutPacket(0xBC) → Encode4 mobId, Encode2 ctrlSN+1, Encode1 packed flags, Encode1 actionType, Encode4 skill m_Data (packed), Encode1 state, Encode4 hackedCode, Encode4 flyCtxTargetX, Encode4 flyCtxTargetY, CMovePath::Flush, end.

calls.comment: flags byte (atlas dwFlag — multiBitFlag with nMoveType / bRiseByToss / etc.)
ti (TARGETINFO — atlas skillData packed; v83 lacks the multiTargetForBall + randTimeForAreaAttack blocks that v87/v95/JMS-v185 carry between actionType and state byte)
flyCtxTargetX (or 16768460 default when not in dev-mode)
CMovePath::Flush body (Movement elements). v83 lacks the post-Flush bChasing/hasTarget/bChasing2/bChasingHack/tChaseDuration tail that v87+ carry.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult.note: v83 OnMemoResult dispatcher. Mode byte consumed by dispatcher; mode=3 (DISPLAY) reads count+items. Wire shape identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#Display.note: mode=3 (DISPLAY). Reads item count then loops calling sub_4E4ADB per item. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#SendSuccess.note: mode=4 (SEND_SUCCESS). No extra fields; dispatcher reads mode byte then falls into string-pool notice. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#SendError.note: mode=5 (SEND_ERROR). errorCode selects string pool notice. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnMemoResult#Refresh.note: mode=8 (REFRESH). OnMemoNotify_Receive called, no further reads. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#ListUpdate.note: mode=7/0xA/0x12. Calls CWvsContext::CFriend::Reset which reads the full buddy list. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Update.note: mode=8. UpdateFriend reads characterId+channelId+mapId. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Invite.note: mode=9 (INVITE). v83 wire: Decode4(characterId) + DecodeStr(name) + sub_A40028(friendList,packet). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#ChannelChang.note: mode=0x14. Reads characterId + channelId + mapId. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#CapacityUpda.note: mode=0x15. Reads buddyListCapacity byte. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnFriendResult#Error.note: mode=0xB/0xC/0xD/0xE/0xF. No extra fields beyond mode. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Created.note: mode=8 (CREATED). v83: Decode4(partyId) + Decode4(memberId) + Decode4(mapId) + Decode2(jobId) + Decode2(level) + memset(3732,0,0x12A=298). Self-creation path, no PARTYDATA::Decode called externally.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Invite.note: mode=4 (INVITE). v83 wire: Decode4(partyId) + DecodeStr(inviterName) + Decode1(autoJoin). NO inviterJobId/inviterLevel — those were added in v95. Atlas Invite previously wrote mode+partyId+name+jobId+level+autoJoin; fix gates jobId/level behind v95+.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Disband.note: mode=12/Left with forcedByte=0. v83: Decode4(partyId) + Decode4(targetId) + Decode1(forced) [branch 0=disband] + PARTYDATA::Decode(298). Wire shape identical to v95 except PARTYDATA size.

calls.comment: PARTYDATA portals[6] × 4 ints (v83: no m_nSKillID, no PQ fields)

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Error.note: mode=9/10/13/16/17/19/21/22/23/25/28/29/30/32/33/35/36. Error codes — no further reads or trivial string decode. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#ChangeLeader.note: mode=27 (CHANGE_LEADER). v83: Decode4(newLeaderId) + Decode1(disconnected). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Join.note: mode=15. v83: Decode4(partyId) + DecodeStr(joinedName) + PARTYDATA::Decode(298). Wire shape identical to v95 except PARTYDATA size (298 vs 378).

calls.comment: PARTYDATA portals[6] × 4 ints (v83 no skillId, no PQ)

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Left.note: mode=12. v83: Decode4(partyId)+Decode4(targetId)+Decode1(forced)+DecodeStr(targetName)+PARTYDATA::Decode(298). Forced branch reads PARTYDATA. Wire shape identical to v95 except PARTYDATA size.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#Update.note: mode=7/34. v83: Decode4(partyId)+PARTYDATA::Decode(0x12A=298 bytes). Confirmed via qmemcpy(v111,&szCookie[3732],0x12A). PARTYDATA in v83 has 4-int portals (no m_nSKillID) and no PQ fields. v95 extended to 0x17A=378.

calls.comment: PARTYDATA portals[6] × 4 ints: townId+fieldId+ptX+ptY (v83 no m_nSKillID, no PQ arrays)

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#OperationBody.note: mode=35 (member HP update index). v83: Decode4(memberId)+Decode4(hp)+Decode4(maxHp). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnPartyResult#InviteReject.note: mode=21/22/23 (invite reject variants). v83: DecodeStr(targetName). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult.note: v83 OnGuildResult dispatcher. Mode byte consumed; social invite case (mode=5) confirmed: Decode4(guildId)+DecodeStr(inviterName) only — no unknown/skillId fields. Those were added in v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#RequestAgreem.note: mode=3. v83: Decode4(partyId)+DecodeStr(leaderName)+DecodeStr(guildName). Wire identical to v95.

calls.comment: partyId (v6==0 path: from CWvsContext party field)

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#Invite.note: mode=5 (INVITE). v83 wire: Decode4(guildId) + DecodeStr(inviterName). NO unknown/skillId — those were added in v95. Fix gates both fields behind v95+.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#ErrorMessage.note: mode=0x1F+n (error-only modes). No extra reads. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#ErrorMessageW.note: mode=0x35/0x36/0x37 (invite rejected/busy/denied). v83: DecodeStr(targetName). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#CapacityChang.note: mode=0x3A. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode1(capacity). Wire identical to v95. Fix in v95 audit: capacity is byte (Decode1), not int (Decode4).

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberJoined.note: mode=0x27. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+sub_4E4445(member struct 0x24 bytes)+1 byte online. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberLeft.note: mode=0x2C. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+DecodeStr(name). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberExpel.note: mode=0x2F. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+DecodeStr(name). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberStatusU.note: mode=0x3D. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+Decode1(online). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#MemberTitleUp.note: mode=0x40. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode4(characterId)+Decode1(title). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#TitleChange.note: mode=0x3E. v83: Decode4(guildId)+5×DecodeStr(titles). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#EmblemChange.note: mode=0x42. v83: Decode4(guildId)+Decode2(logoBackground)+Decode1(bgColor)+Decode2(logo)+Decode1(logoColor). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#NoticeChange.note: mode=0x44. v83: Decode4(guildId)+DecodeStr(notice). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#Info.note: mode=0x1E (v4-1=30, v5=29, v6=27 → v40=0 branch). Calls sub_4E4553 to read full GUILDDATA. Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildResult#AgreementResp.note: mode=0x03 RequestAgreement path (v4==3). v83: Decode4(partyId)+DecodeStr(leaderName)+DecodeStr(guildName). Wire identical to v95.

CWvsContext::OnGuildBBSPacket.note: v83 OnGuildBBSPacket is a 0x16-byte thunk — too small to decompile. Delegates to an inner handler. v83 guild BBS functions (BBSThreadList, BBSThread) appear to exist as inner sub-functions called from this thunk. Serverbound BBS functions (SendLoadListRequest, SendViewEntryRequest, OnCommentDelete etc.) are absent as standalone named functions in v83.

CUIGuildBBS::OnGuildBBSPacket#BBSThreadL.note: v83 BBSThreadList sub-handler. Address is the outer thunk; inner function not separately named. Wire assumed identical to v95 (same packet format). Audit cannot confirm without decompiling inner function.

CUIGuildBBS::OnGuildBBSPacket#BBSThread.note: v83 BBSThread sub-handler. Address is the outer thunk; inner function not separately named. Wire assumed identical to v95. Audit cannot confirm without decompiling inner function.

CUIGuildBBS::SendLoadListRequest.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function — not found in binary. Likely inlined or handled differently in v83. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::SendViewEntryRequest.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::OnCommentDelete.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::OnRegister.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::OnComment.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIGuildBBS::OnDelete.note: ABSENT in v83 as a standalone named function. Cannot audit.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Add.note: mode=0 (OnEnter). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Join.note: mode=1 (OnSelfEnterResult). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Remove.note: mode=2 (OnLeave). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#RequestInvite.note: mode=3 (OnInvite). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#InviteSent.note: mode=4 (OnInviteResult). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#InviteDeclined.note: mode=5 (OnBlocked). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Chat.note: mode=6 (OnChat). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnPacket#Update.note: mode=7 (OnAvatar). v83 dispatcher confirmed. Wire identical to v95. Note: v83 OnPacket also has mode=8 (OnMigrated) absent from v95.

CUIMessenger::OnCreate.note: Client sends op=0+messengerId when accepting invite. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::OnDestroy.note: Client sends op=2 when closing window. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::SendInviteMsg.note: Client sends op=5+fromName+myName when declining. Wire identical to v95.

CUIMessenger::ProcessChat.note: Client sends messenger chat op=6+text. Wire identical to v95.

CField::SendChatMsg.note: v83 SendChatMsg@0x52c315. Confirmed: EncodeStr(text)+Encode1(balloon) only. NO updateTime field (absent in v83; present in v87+ via >83 gate already correct in atlas). Wire identical to what atlas already gates correctly.

calls.comment: x (target position X; only when portal name present)
y (target position Y; only when portal name present)
m_nChannelID (channel id) — v83 has NO DecodeOpt before it and NO m_dwOldDriverID after it
timestamp (DecodeBuffer p,8u FILETIME) — v83 has NO logout-gift block before it
m_nChannelID (channel id) — v83 NO DecodeOpt, NO m_dwOldDriverID
nHP — v83 reads Decode2 (2 bytes), v95 reads Decode4 (v20)
overrideAppear flag (v4; checked v4==1 in AppearShip case)
nType (mist type; ==3 is item-area-buff branch, v95.m_Data)
rcArea RECT (16 bytes = ltX,ltY,rbX,rbY as 4x int32, v86)
bAnimation (leave animation type; 0=play despawn animation, v3)
message (only when itemId!=0 && blowType==0; start path)
flag1 (EventTimerClock enable byte; representative arm = case 3)

CUserLocal::OnTutorMsg#Message.notes: TALK_GUIDE. v83 CUserLocal::OnTutorMsg@0x960239 has the SAME message/hint split as v95: Decode1(bByMessage); the FALSE (==0) arm at 0x960284 calls DecodeStr(message)+Decode4(width)+Decode4(duration) -> CTutor::OnMessage(ZXString,int,int). Atlas GuideTalkMessage writes the leading bool as false (matches v95). Phase-2 unconditional fix VERIFIED correct for v83 — no version gate needed.

CUserLocal::OnTutorMsg#Idx.notes: TALK_GUIDE. Same v83 CUserLocal::OnTutorMsg@0x960239 handler; the TRUE (!=0) arm at 0x960268 calls Decode4(hintId)+Decode4(duration) -> CTutor::OnMessage(int,int), NO string. Same polarity as v95. Atlas GuideTalkIdx writes the leading bool as true. Phase-2 unconditional fix VERIFIED correct for v83.

CShopDlg::SetShopDlg.notes: OPEN_NPC_SHOP. v83 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x756da7 (nType==0x131) -> CShopDlg::SetShopDlg@0x7529ad. Decode4(npcTemplateId)+Decode2(count)+per-commodity loop (while idx<count, no cap). Per item (0x752a01..0x752a78): Decode4 itemId + 4x Decode4 (mesoPrice,tokenPrice,period,levelLimit) + (itemId/10000 in {207,233} ? DecodeBuffer(8) unitPrice double : Decode2 quantity) + Decode2 slotMax. v83 has NO discountRate byte (GMS>=87) and NO tokenItemId int (GMS>=95) — both atlas-gated off for v83, matching this shape. Analyzer flattens the loop (TOOL LIMITATION, manually verified). Export models templateId+count+one representative non-ammo item.

calls.comment: commodity count (loop bound; no max cap)
[item] quantity (non-ammo branch; ammo categories 207/233 read DecodeBuffer(8) unitPrice double instead)

CShopDlg::OnPacket#Simple.notes: CONFIRM_SHOP_TRANSACTION. v83 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x756da7 (nType==0x132) switch(Decode1 mode). Mode-only arms (cases 0,1,2,3,4,5,8,9,10,16 and default) read no further packet fields — they show a StringPool Notice. Atlas ShopOperationSimple writes Byte(mode) only. v83 mode-enum values differ from v95 (level-req=14/15, generic-error=17 in v83) but the mode byte is the server-config discriminator, not encoded by atlas. OP-FAMILY deferred to _pending.md.

CShopDlg::OnPacket#LevelRequirement.notes: Same v83 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x756da7 (nType==0x132). Cases 14 (0x756f81) and 15 (0x756ffd) read Decode4 (a level value formatted into an over/under level-requirement Notice). Atlas ShopOperationLevelRequirement writes Byte(mode)+Int(levelLimit). The mode byte is the switch discriminator.

CShopDlg::OnPacket#GenericError.notes: Same v83 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x756da7 (nType==0x132). Case 17 (0x756f1b): Decode1(hasReason); if non-zero, DecodeStr(reason) and show it as a Notice, else default Notice. Atlas ShopOperationGenericError writes Byte(mode)+Bool(hasReason)+optional AsciiString(reason). The mode byte is the switch discriminator.

CNpcPool::OnNpcEnterField.notes: SPAWN_NPC. v83 CNpcPool::OnNpcEnterField@0x6d9993 reads Decode4(npcId) then (new-entry path) Decode4(templateId), then CNpc::Init@0x6d089a reads Decode2(x)+Decode2(cy)+Decode1(moveAction)+Decode2(fh)+Decode2(rx0)+Decode2(rx1)+Decode1(enabled). Atlas Spawn writes Int(id)+Int(template)+Int16(x)+Int16(cy)+Byte(f)+Short(fh)+Int16(rx0)+Int16(rx1)+Byte(1). Field-for-field match — identical to v95.

CNpcPool::OnNpcChangeController.notes: SPAWN_NPC_REQUEST_CONTROLLER. v83 CNpcPool::OnNpcChangeController@0x6d9a83 reads Decode1(localFlag)+Decode4(npcId); when localFlag!=0 calls CNpcPool::SetLocalNpc@0x6d9549 which (new-entry path) reads Decode4(templateId) then CNpc::Init@0x6d089a reads the same x/cy/moveAction/fh/rx0/rx1/enabled tail. Atlas SpawnRequestController writes Byte(1)+Int(id)+Int(template)+Int16(x)+Int16(cy)+Byte(f)+Short(fh)+Int16(rx0)+Int16(rx1)+Bool(miniMap). Matches v95.

calls.comment: localFlag (controller assigned to local user; atlas leading 1)

CNpc::OnMove.notes: NPC_ACTION. v83 dispatched via CNpcPool::OnNpcPacket@0x6d98de which Decode4(npcId) BEFORE calling CNpc::OnMove@0x6d2e07 (case 0x104). OnMove reads Decode1(action)+Decode1(chatIdx), then (template m_pTemplate->bMove gated) a CMovePath::OnMovePacket movement body. Movement presence is server-controlled in atlas (hasMovement) — conditional movement is a tool limitation. Export models the dispatcher-prefix int + the two action bytes. Matches v95.

calls.comment: npcId (consumed by CNpcPool::OnNpcPacket@0x6d98de dispatcher before OnMove; atlas Action.objectId)

CScriptMan::OnScriptMessage.notes: SCRIPT_MESSAGE / NPC_TALK. v83 CScriptMan::OnScriptMessage@0x74660a reads the common header Decode1(speakerType)+Decode4(npcTemplate)+Decode1(msgType)+Decode1(bParam), then switch(msgType) to per-type handlers. NOTE: v83 dialog-type enum DIFFERS from v95 — v83 has NO SayImage case (v95 msgType 1) and its values are shifted (AskYesNo=1 in v83 vs 2 in v95, etc.). Atlas NpcConversation.Encode writes byte(speakerTypeId)+int(speakerTemplateId)+byte(msgType)+byte(param)+(param&4?int(secondaryNpcTemplateId))+WriteByteArray(detail); the msgType byte is resolved from tenant config (ResolveCode 'messageType'), so the per-version enum is handled at the template/config layer, NOT in the encoder. The param&4 secondary read and detail body are consumed inside each per-type handler (OnSay reads secondary first). Per-dialog-type bodies audited individually.

calls.comment: nMsgType / v5 (dialog-type discriminator; v83 enum: 0=Say,1=AskYesNo,2=AskText,3=AskNumber,4=AskMenu,5=AskQuiz,6=AskSpeedQuiz,7=AskAvatar,8=AskMembershopAvatar,9=AskPet,10=AskPetAll,12=AskYesNoQuest,13=AskBoxText,14=AskSlideMenu — SHIFTED vs v95 which has SayImage=1)
bParam (speaker flags; bit 2 (param&4) gates a secondary npc template id read inside the per-type handler)

CScriptMan::OnSay#Say.notes: Dialog type 0 (Say). v83 CScriptMan::OnSay@0x7467ab body (after the param&4 secondary Decode4 at 0x7467cd which the wrapper covers): DecodeStr(message @0x7467d6)+Decode1(bPrev @0x7467ec)+Decode1(bNext @0x7467fe). Atlas SayConversationDetail: AsciiString(Message)+Bool(Previous)+Bool(Next). Match.

CScriptMan::OnSayImage#SayImage.notes: Dialog type 1 in v95 (NOTE: v83 OnScriptMessage switch has NO SayImage case — CScriptMan::OnSayImage@0x961275 EXISTS in v83 and is invokable via SetUtilDlgEx_IMAGE but is not reachable through the standard script-message msgType dispatch; in v83 SayImage is a Say(0) variant with images set separately). The handler itself: Decode1(count @0x961302)+loop count x DecodeStr(image @0x961318). Atlas SayImageConversationDetail (post-fix): Byte(len)+loop AsciiString. Count is a single byte (Decode1) NOT int — Phase-2 unconditional WriteByte fix VERIFIED correct for v83. Analyzer flattens the loop.

calls.comment: image path -- loop body (count iterations; analyzer flattens)

CScriptMan::OnAskYesNo#AskYesNo.notes: Dialog type 1 (AskYesNo) in v83 / type 2 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskYesNo@0x74692c body: DecodeStr(message @0x746945) only. Atlas AskYesNoConversationDetail: AsciiString(Message). Match.

CScriptMan::OnAskText#AskText.notes: Dialog type 2 (AskText) in v83 / type 3 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskText@0x746a8b body: DecodeStr(message @0x746aa6)+DecodeStr(def @0x746ab6)+Decode2(min @0x746abd)+Decode2(max @0x746add). Atlas AskTextConversationDetail: AsciiString(Message)+AsciiString(Def)+Short(Min)+Short(Max). Match.

CScriptMan::OnAskNumber#AskNumber.notes: Dialog type 3 (AskNumber) in v83 / type 4 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskNumber@0x746dff body: DecodeStr(message @0x746e1a)+Decode4(def @0x746e2d)+Decode4(min @0x746e37)+Decode4(max @0x746e49). Atlas AskNumberConversationDetail: AsciiString(Message)+Int(Def)+Int(Min)+Int(Max). Match.

CScriptMan::OnAskMenu#AskMenu.notes: Dialog type 4 (AskMenu) in v83 / type 5 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskMenu@0x746fad body: DecodeStr(message @0x746fc6) only. Atlas AskMenuConversationDetail: AsciiString(Message). Match.

CScriptMan::OnAskQuiz#AskQuiz.notes: Dialog type 5 (AskQuiz) in v83 / type 6 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskQuiz@0x747a22 delegates to CWvsContext::OnInitialQuiz@0xa26b09: Decode1(fail); if fail==0: DecodeStr(title)+DecodeStr(problem)+DecodeStr(hint)+Decode4(min)+Decode4(max)+Decode4(timeRemaining). Atlas AskQuizConversationDetail: Bool(Fail); if !Fail: AsciiString(Title)+AsciiString(Problem)+AsciiString(Hint)+Int(Min)+Int(Max)+Int(TimeRemaining). Match. Analyzer flattens the conditional.

calls.comment: fail flag (v4; nonzero = clear quiz UI, no further fields)

CScriptMan::OnAskSpeedQuiz#AskSpeedQuiz.notes: Dialog type 6 (AskSpeedQuiz) in v83 / type 7 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskSpeedQuiz@0x747a34 delegates to CWvsContext::OnInitialSpeedQuiz@0xa26c66: Decode1(fail); if fail==0: Decode4(type)+Decode4(answer)+Decode4(correct)+Decode4(remain)+Decode4(timeRemaining). Atlas AskSpeedQuizConversationDetail: Bool(Fail); if !Fail: Int(Type)+Int(Answer)+Int(Correct)+Int(Remain)+Int(TimeRemaining). Match. Analyzer flattens the conditional.

CScriptMan::OnAskAvatar#AskAvatar.notes: Dialog type 7 (AskAvatar) in v83 / type 8 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskAvatar@0x74713d body: DecodeStr(message @0x74715e)+Decode1(count @0x747172)+loop count x Decode4(style @0x74718e). Atlas AskAvatarConversationDetail: AsciiString(Message)+Byte(len)+loop Int(style). Match. Count is Decode1 (byte).

CScriptMan::OnAskMembershopAvatar#AskMem.notes: Dialog type 8 (AskMembershopAvatar) in v83 / type 9 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskMembershopAvatar@0x74730b: DecodeStr(message @0x74732c)+Decode1(count @0x747340)+loop count x Decode4(candidate @0x74735c). CScriptMan::OnAskPet#AskPet.notes: Dialog type 9 (AskPet) in v83 / type 10 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskPet@0x7474a2 body: DecodeStr(message @0x7474bc)+Decode1(count @0x7474d5)+loop count x {DecodeBuffer(8) cashId @0x74751f + Decode1 @0x747527}. CScriptMan::OnAskPetAll#AskPetAll.notes: Dialog type 10 (AskPetAll) in v83 / type 11 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskPetAll@0x74775c body: DecodeStr(message @0x747776)+Decode1(count @0x74778d)+Decode1(exceptionExists @0x74779c)+loop count x {DecodeBuffer(8) cashId @0x7477e3 + Decode1 @0x7477eb}. CScriptMan::OnAskBoxText#AskBoxText.notes: Dialog type 13 (AskBoxText) in v83 / type 14 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskBoxText@0x746c46 body: DecodeStr(message @0x746c61)+DecodeStr(def @0x746c71)+Decode2(col @0x746c86)+Decode2(line @0x746c98). Atlas AskBoxTextConversationDetail: AsciiString(Message)+AsciiString(Def)+Short(Col)+Short(Line). Match.

CScriptMan::OnAskSlideMenu#AskSlideMenu.notes: Dialog type 14 (AskSlideMenu) in v83 / type 15 in v95. v83 CScriptMan::OnAskSlideMenu@0x747a46 constructs CSlideMenuDlgEX@0x76b3f0 which calls SetSlideMenuDlg@0x76b5c8: Decode4(menuType @0x76b5e4)+DecodeStr(message @0x76b5ee). NO leading int/bool before menuType in v83. Atlas AskSlideMenuConversationDetail gates the leading WriteInt(unknown) on (Region==GMS && MajorVersion()>83), so for v83 it writes only Int(MenuType)+AsciiString(Message). The existing version gate is VERIFIED correct for v83.

CUserLocal::TalkToNpc.notes: NPC_TALK (start). v83 CUserLocal::TalkToNpc@0x95fe9e (non-quest branch) builds COutPacket(0x3A) + Encode4(npcId @0x95fef4) + Encode2(x @0x95ff0b) + Encode2(y @0x95ff1f). Atlas StartConversation writes Int(oid)+Int16(x)+Int16(y). Match.

CScriptMan::OnSay#Reply.notes: NPC_TALK_MORE generic continue reply, built inside v83 CScriptMan::OnSay@0x7467ab after DoModal (0x7468ae): COutPacket(0x3C)+Encode1(0 msgType)+Encode1(action). Atlas ContinueConversation writes Byte(lastMessageType)+Byte(action). Dispatcher header; selection/text trailing fields are separate structs. Match.

CScriptMan::OnAskMenu#Selection.notes: NPC_TALK_MORE AskMenu reply trailing field, built inside v83 CScriptMan::OnAskMenu@0x746fad after DoModal (0x747094): COutPacket(0x3C)+Encode1(4 msgType)+Encode1(action); when selected appends Encode4(selection @0x7470cf). The msgType+action bytes belong to atlas ContinueConversation; ContinueConversationSelection writes ONLY the trailing selection. Atlas Decode picks width at runtime (Available()>=4 -> Int32 wide else Byte). AskAvatar (msgType 7 in v83) instead appends Encode1 (1-byte) at 0x7472b0, so both client widths exist; modeled as the wide (Encode4) path. Analyzer flattens the branch — tool limitation.

calls.comment: selection / m_nSelect (AskMenu = 4-byte int; atlas ContinueConversationSelection wide path)

CScriptMan::OnAskText#Reply.notes: NPC_TALK_MORE AskText reply trailing field, built inside v83 CScriptMan::OnAskText@0x746a8b after DoModal (0x746b94): COutPacket(0x3C)+Encode1(2 msgType)+Encode1(action); when action==1 appends EncodeStr(input @0x746bce). The leading msgType+action bytes belong to atlas ContinueConversation (audited separately); ContinueConversationText writes ONLY the trailing AsciiString(text). Match.

calls.comment: input text (atlas ContinueConversationText.text; only emitted when action==1)

Atlas ShopBuy writes Short(slot)+Int(itemId)+Short(quantity)+Int(discountPrice). Match.

CShopDlg::SendSellRequest.notes: NPC_SHOP SELL body (op=1). v83 CShopDlg::SendSellRequest@0x756a04 after COutPacket(0x3D)+Encode1(1 op @0x756bc1): Encode2(slot @0x756bcc)+Encode4(itemId @0x756bd7)+Encode2(quantity @0x756be2). Atlas ShopSell writes Int16(slot)+Int(itemId)+Short(quantity). Match.

CShopDlg::SendRechargeRequest.notes: NPC_SHOP RECHARGE body (op=2). v83 CShopDlg::SendRechargeRequest@0x756c28 after COutPacket(0x3D)+Encode1(2 op @0x756d51): Encode2(slot @0x756d5a). Atlas ShopRecharge writes Short(slot). Match.
